590 INVSV_VNTLTR_DSCHRG_CD INVSV_VNTLTR_DSCHRG_CD Therapies: Invasive Mechanical Ventilator (Disch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving invasive mechanical ventilator (or respirator) therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
591 NONINVSV_VNTLTR_ADMSN_CD NONINVSV_VNTLTR_ADMSN_CD Therapies: Non-Invas Mechanical Ventilator
